changelogs: - Security: key handout while lockpicking is now authorized serverside (removed the open addTempKey event)
- Security: the search-for-key roll now happens on the server instead of the client
- Security: owner, police and live-location alerts are now fully serverside via a validated event and can no longer be spoofed (removed ownerAlert, policeAlert, liveCoords)
- Security: the owner identifier is no longer sent to the lockpicking client
- Security: the alarm stage is validated against the config before it is saved
- Added serverside hook 'msk_enginetoggle:engineToggled' (src, netId, state)
- Performance: the heli/plane pool loop no longer writes a replicated statebag every tick
- Optimization: the DB query on vehicle enter now only runs for vehicles flagged as stolen
- Replaced asserts in exported functions with graceful returns
- Config.Debug now defaults to false
- Removed the dead serverside 'toggledEngine' trigger
- Fix engine sync via statebag handlers + optimizations
- New client/sync.lua: statebag handlers (isEngineOn, SteeringAngle, isDamaged) with resolveEntityFromBag + applyEngineState helpers
- Slim down the CVehicle pool loop (steering now synced via statebag handler, cache playerVehicle); keep only heli/plane blade logic
- Fix undefined src -> source in server getInventory (core_inventory lookup)
- Resolve Config.Framework clientside in AUTO mode
- Fixed Vehicle Blacklist
- Added VehicleClamp by Kiminaze
- Some code improvements and removing of unnecessary code
- Fixed an Error with export msk_vehiclekeys AddKey()
- Fixed an Error with export msk_vehiclekeys AddKey()
- Added Blacklist for vehicles
- Added Classes to Whitelilst
- Fixed an issue with 'getIsKeyOwner()'
- Fixed an issue with AcePermissions
- Fixed that the Vehicle Keys doesn't work correctly
- Fixed an error with Alarm Stages
- Fixed support for vehicles_keys by Jaksam
- Fixed client crashes while lockpicking a vehicle
- Added wasabi_carlock
- Fixed a serverside issue when installing an alarm_stage
- Fixed that the client was crashing after lockpicking a vehicle
- Added Dependency msk_core
- Added wasabi_carlock
- Changed folder structure
- Some other stuff
- Release
